Church.title: Church
Church.description: Represents a church within the multi-tenant ParishScribe application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Church entity.

contactEmail.description: The contact email address for the church.

address.description: The physical address of the church.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who created and owns the church.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the church was created.

logoUrl.description: The URL of the uploaded church logo.

calendarUrl.description: The URL for the public iCal feed for event imports.

primaryColor.description: The primary brand color for the church, in hex format.

secondaryColor.description: The secondary brand color for the church, in hex format.

accentColor.description: The accent brand color for the church, in hex format.

fontFamily.description: The default font family for shared materials.

onboardingCompleted.description: Flag to indicate if the admin has completed the initial setup wizard.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a service or event scheduled within the church.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

eventName.description: The name of the event (e.g., Sunday Morning Eucharist).

eventDate.description: The date and time of the event.

notes.description: Optional notes or description for the event.

isPublished.description: Indicates if the event is visible to volunteers.

isSignupEnabled.description: Indicates if volunteers can sign themselves up for roles in this event.

signupScope.description: Determines which roles volunteers can see for sign-up.

signupRequiresQualification.description: If true, only volunteers with the role in their profile can sign up. If false, any volunteer can sign up.

seriesId.description: A unique identifier for a series of recurring events.

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Represents a volunteer role for a specific event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Role entity.

roleName.description: The name of the volunteer role (e.g., Lector, Acolyte, Usher).

assignedVolunteerId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Role). The UID of the assigned volunteer.

assignedVolunteerName.description: The name of the assigned volunteer.

status.description: The status of the volunteer assignment (Pending, Confirmed, Declined, Pending Substitution).

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user (volunteer or admin) in the system. Authentication data (password, etc.) are assumed to be handled externally.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity. This would likely correspond to the UID from the external authentication system (e.g. Firebase Auth).

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user. Can be null for admin-managed volunteers.

isAdmin.description: Indicates if the user has administrative privileges.

isSuperUser.description: Indicates if the user has platform-wide super administrative privileges. Primarily managed via custom claims.

role.description: The user's primary role in the application.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

availableRoleIds.description: An array of RoleTemplate IDs that the volunteer is available to fill.

availableRecurringEventSeriesIds.description: An array of event series IDs that the volunteer is available to serve at.

assignmentCount.description: The total number of times this volunteer has been assigned to a role.

lastAssigned.description: The timestamp of the last time this volunteer was assigned to a role.

familyId.description: The ID of the family this user belongs to. Can be the UID of the household manager.

servingPreference.description: The user's preference for serving with family members.

isHouseholdManager.description: Indicates if this user is the primary contact for a family.

status.description: The status of the user account, used for family member approvals and invitations.

unavailability.description: An array of dates (YYYY-MM-DD) when the volunteer is unavailable.

isManagedByAdmin.description: Indicates if this volunteer account is created and managed by an administrator, without its own login.

RoleTemplate.title: RoleTemplate
RoleTemplate.description: Represents a reusable volunteer role template for a church.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RoleTemplate entity.

name.description: The name of the role (e.g., Lector, Acolyte, Usher).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the role template was created.

ServiceTemplate.title: ServiceTemplate
ServiceTemplate.description: A template for creating a service, with a predefined set of roles and recurrence info.

churchId.description: The ID of the church this template belongs to.

name.description: The name of the service template (e.g. 'Sunday Morning Eucharist').

dayOfWeek.description: The day of the week for recurrence (0=Sunday, 1=Monday, etc.).

timeOfDay.description: The time of day for recurrence in HH:mm format (24-hour).

roles.description: An array of roles included in this service template.

SupportTicket.title: SupportTicket
SupportTicket.description: Represents a support ticket submitted by a user.

churchId.description: The ID of the church this ticket is associated with.

submittedByUid.description: The UID of the user who submitted the ticket.

submittedByName.description: The name of the user who submitted the ticket.

TicketComment.title: TicketComment
TicketComment.description: Represents a comment on a support ticket.

commentByUid.description: The UID of the user who made the comment.

commentByName.description: The name of the user who made the comment.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a log of an email sent from the system.

errorMessage.description: The error message if the email failed to send.

emailContent.description: The full HTML content of the email.

type.description: The type of notification that was sent.

SeriesMetadata.title: SeriesMetadata
SeriesMetadata.description: Stores settings for a recurring event series.

seriesId.description: The unique identifier for the event series this metadata applies to.

isPerpetual.description: If true, the series should automatically be extended to always have events scheduled for a year out.

rruleString.description: The RRule string defining the recurrence pattern (e.g. FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU).

/churches/{churchId}.description: Stores information about each individual church tenant.

/churches/{churchId}/events/{eventId}.description: Stores event details as a subcollection of a church.

/churches/{churchId}/events/{eventId}/ro.description: Stores roles associated with an event as a subcollection.

/churches/{churchId}/role_templates/{rol.description: Stores reusable role templates for a specific church.

/churches/{churchId}/service_templates/{.description: Stores reusable service templates for a specific church.

/churches/{churchId}/notifications/{noti.description: Stores a log of all outgoing email notifications for a church.

/churches/{churchId}/series_metadata/{se.description: Stores metadata and settings for recurring event series.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. Path-based ownership ensures only the user or an admin can access it.

/support_tickets/{ticketId}.description: Stores support tickets submitted by users.

/support_tickets/{ticketId}/comments/{co.description: Stores comments for a specific support ticket.
